27335.title: Doctor Who: Twice Upon A Time
27335.description: Two Doctors stranded in a forbidding snowscape, refusing to face regeneration, and a British army captain seemingly destined to die in the First World War, but taken from the trenches to play his part in the Doctor's story. This is the magical last chapter in the Twelfth Doctor's epic adventure. He must face his past to decide his future, and realise the resilience of humanity, discovering hope in his darkest frozen moment. It's the end of an era, but the Doctor's journey is only just beginning.

27336.title: Bad Move
27336.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

27337.title: Bad Move
27337.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

27338.title: Ordinary Lies
27338.description: Forklift driver Wendy is always up for a laugh. However, when her past catches up with her, Wendy takes drastic measures to make sure her problem goes away for good.

27339.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27339.description: Hyacinth volunteers Richard's services when there is a problem with the lights at the church hall, and he reluctantly agrees despite the fact that DIY is not really his forte.

27340.title: Casualty
27340.description: Marty's family life crashes around him as he confronts a familiar face, and Jacob realises the true extent of his feelings for Tina.

27341.title: Impossible
27341.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

27342.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27342.description: Frank Hathaway finds an unlikely partner in Lu Shakespeare when the pair are thrown together to catch a killer and clear Lu's name.

27343.title: Bad Move
27343.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

27344.title: Keeping Up Appearances
27344.description: Hyacinth volunteers Richard's services when there is a problem with the lights at the church hall, and he reluctantly agrees despite the fact that DIY is not really his forte.

27345.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
27345.description: The four remaining sewers battle it out for a place in the semi-final. They face three challenges, none of which permit a pattern for guidance. Some play it safe to reproduce simple dresses while others take ambitious risks, but who will be rewarded?

27346.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
27346.description: Frank Hathaway finds an unlikely partner in Lu Shakespeare when the pair are thrown together to catch a killer and clear Lu's name.

27347.title: Bargain Hunt
27347.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire, with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of friends take on each other to buy three items that they hope will make a profit at auction. They all have their sights on a golden gavel but only one team will achieve their goal.

27348.title: Casualty
27348.description: Marty's family life crashes around him as he confronts a familiar face, and Jacob realises the true extent of his feelings for Tina.

27349.title: Call the Midwife
27349.description: A disease outbreak brings back bad memories for Patsy, while Sister Winifred is forced to reconsider her prejudices when dealing with a mother-to-be. Barbara faces a dilemma when Tom asks her to dinner.

27350.title: Call the Midwife
27350.description: The pressures of modern Britain reach Poplar as a hospital secondment and a difficult birth raise moral questions for Sister Julienne. Trixie and Tom help a family breaking apart under the pressure of a son's dreams for the future.

27351.title: Doctors
27351.description: Bear meets the infamous Miranda Evans, and Sid puzzles over his first labour. Emma has to get a fractured family to come together when a graduation day becomes too much.

27352.title: Doctors
27352.description: Miranda arrives at the Mill, impressing everyone, but Valerie has her suspicions, Meanwhile, Rob has to solve the mystery behind a violent attack on a pensioner.

27353.title: Doctors
27353.description: Al is keen to try out his new game app on the team, and Karen proves especially enthusiastic. Emma is challenged when a stabbing leads to an internal police investigation.

27354.title: Doctors
27354.description: Ruhma supports one couple from the start to the end of their pregnancy journey, but must admit that she needs help herself.

27355.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
27355.description: The four remaining sewers battle it out for a place in the semi-final. They face three challenges, none of which permit a pattern for guidance. Some play it safe to reproduce simple dresses while others take ambitious risks, but who will be rewarded?

27356.title: EastEnders
27356.description: There's an incident at the gym when Linda pushes herself too hard. Iqra supports Mila as she stands up for what she believes, and Kheerat must make a change to keep on Ben's good side.

27357.title: EastEnders
27357.description: Sharon is shocked to hear Linda's secret, Jean convinces Mo to take a chance, and Ben agrees to help Kheerat and his family.

27358.title: EastEnders
27358.description: Mo's big revelation leaves Jean shocked, Phil is touched to be invited to a special event for Bert and Ernie, and Iqra's good deed backfires leaving her guilt-ridden.

27359.title: EastEnders
27359.description: Callum's work leaves Ben feeling uneasy, and Kat finds herself in a frightening situation.

27360.title: Casualty
27360.description: Marty's family life crashes around him as he confronts a familiar face, and Jacob realises the true extent of his feelings for Tina.
